feat.name: Aeon Resonance
feat.special: At 8th level, you can take this feat again. If you do, you gain the resonance powers of up to four invested aeon stones instead of only one.
feat.text: You gain the resonant power of one embedded aeon stone as if it were placed in a wayfinder. While you can embed multiple *aeon stones* in your flesh, you can gain the resonance power from only one embedded stone at a time, selected each day when you make your daily preparations.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

pfs.note: The Aeon Resonance feat acts as if an aeon stone was embedded in a wayfinder, and thus would not allow a second aeon stone to provide its resonance power from being embedded in a wayfinder.
